name: Suite — ServiceOps Syrian Utility Domain (EN + AR)
description: Regression net for the multi-domain rebuild. Tests the SuperAdminCopilot's ability to reason across Customer / Bill / Department / Region / Ticket — the core entities a Syrian utility ops platform exposes. Covers: pure billing aggregations, department-level performance comparisons, cross-domain joins (e.g. customers with both open tickets AND unpaid bills), pattern-discovery questions that surface the seeded story patterns (Aleppo internet outage, Homs bill anomaly, bad/star departments), and Arabic variants of all of the above. Pattern-discovery questions omit ExpectedSql since the result set depends on seeded data — they assert via ExpectedMinRows that the seeded story is discoverable.

Scenarios.Question: how many overdue bills are there?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Bills WHERE Status = 'Overdue'

Scenarios.Question: total electricity revenue in the last 12 months
average internet bill amount across all customers
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(TotalAmount) FROM Bills WHERE ServiceType = 'Internet'

Scenarios.Question: show overdue electricity bills in Aleppo above 30000 SYP
which service type generates the most revenue?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT ServiceType, SUM(TotalAmount) AS Revenue FROM Bills GROUP BY ServiceType ORDER BY Revenue DESC

Scenarios.Question: how many customers are active?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Customers WHERE Status = 'Active'

Scenarios.Question: list customers in Damascus
customers who churned in the last 6 months
list all departments
compare overdue bill rates across all electricity departments
ticket volume per department in the last 90 days
which department has the highest billing-dispute ticket rate?
departments with overdue rate above 20%
customers with overdue bills AND open tickets
how many tickets are about billing disputes? group by department
customers in Damascus with total billed above 200000 SYP this year
find customers at risk of churn — multiple overdue bills and unresolved tickets
which districts have the most service-down complaints?
find ticket clusters that suggest an internet outage in the last 90 days
find customers whose electricity bills spiked 2x for 3 months then returned to normal
which department appears to be underperforming across multiple metrics?
كم عدد الفواتير المتأخرة؟
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Bills WHERE Status = 'Overdue'

Scenarios.Question: أظهر لي العملاء في دمشق
ما متوسط فاتورة الإنترنت عبر جميع المحافظات؟
أي إدارة كهرباء لديها أعلى نسبة فواتير متأخرة؟
أوجد العملاء الذين لديهم فواتير متأخرة وتذاكر مفتوحة معاً
